job.title: Build KAIROS VS Code Extension Scaffold for SIN Code
tasks: Initialize VS Code Extension Repository using generator-code (TypeScript) inside the 'vscode-extension' directory.
Implement RPC Bridge to talk to the sin-code CLI.
Build basic Sidebar Webview in React for the Chat Interface, inspired by Claude Code's terminal renderer.
Ensure all code follows the enterprise standards (no direct Gemini API, strictly opencode CLI via Qwen3.6-plus-free).

context.design_guidance: Steal Kilo Code's 'Mode Selector' UI and Claude Code's memory structure. React Webview must be optimized for performance.

done_criteria: VS Code Extension is compiled and can be installed via .vsix.
Extension successfully routes prompts to the local sin-code CLI.
Basic Sidebar Webview is functional and renders without errors.
